name: histone_cluster_chr2L_39DE
description: Histone gene cluster at cytological band 39DE on chr2L. Contains ~100 tandem copies of the 5 kb unit encoding all 5 canonical histones (H1, H2A, H2B, H3, H4). Unique drosophila feature: the cluster is the SOLE source of replication-dependent histones (no dispersed histone genes). Strict copy-number selection; reducing below ~10 copies is lethal. Adjacent to the chr2L proximal heterochromatin boundary.
expected_copy_count: ~100 tandem copies of the 5 kb histone repeat unit (variable 80-160 across strains)
